name: GodMode Server
postCreateCommand: git clone https://github.com/johnjuuljensen/GodMode.git /tmp/godmode-src && sudo dotnet publish /tmp/godmode-src/src/GodMode.Server -c Release -o /opt/godmode-server && cp -r /tmp/godmode-src/.devcontainer/godmode-server/roots $HOME/roots && sudo rm -rf /tmp/godmode-src && gh auth setup-git && curl -fsSL https://claude.ai/install.sh | bash

postStartCommand.port-visibility: sleep 5 && gh codespace ports visibility 31337:public -c "$CODESPACE_NAME" 2>/dev/null || true

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Anthropic API key for Claude Code
